text.title: Approval Token as Signed JWT Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for gov-approval-token-signed-jwt.

decision-tree.root-question: Do agents initiate privileged actions in this environment?

example.trace: Agent requests deploy → approver signs JWT (aud=prod-cluster-us-east-1, scope=deploy:payments, exp=600s, jti=uuid) → agent presents → verifier checks sig + aud + scope + exp + jti in nonce store → mark jti consumed → action allowed.
